title: scorzoneroides carpetana subsp. duboisii
intro: Scorzoneroides carpetana subsp. duboisii, also known as the Spanish broom or Scorzoneroides duboisii, is a plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) that has been traditionally used in folk medicine. This plant is believed to have medicinal properties due to its bioactive compounds, including flavonoids and saponins, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Scorzoneroides carpetana subsp. duboisii include its potential use in treating various conditions, such as digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. In terms of herbal preparations, Scorzoneroides carpetana subsp. duboisii can be consumed as a tea, capsule, or tincture, although its use should be under the guidance of a healthcare professional due to potential side effects and interactions with medications.
